articles.description: The AINRC remains the mainstay of the Union Territory’s political landscape, a position once occupied by the Congress. The decision of businessman Jose Charles Martin — who has deep pockets — to venture into electoral politics may have changed the dynamics of the 2026 election in Puducherry

articles.title: HistoriCity | Transgender identities always a part of India’s cultural discourse
articles.description: In ancient times, members of the transgender community were often integrated into religious and community life

articles.title: Daily deficit of 55MTs auto LPG in Telangana; Uttam places three requests before Centre to safeguard drivers’ livelihoods

topStories.description: Somali federal government hails Baidoa's transition, urging peace and unity amid political changes and rising tensions.

topStories.title: Iran war wipes $120bn off Dubai, Abu Dhabi stock markets
topStories.description: The UAE's financial markets have been some of the hardest hit by the fallout of the US-Israel war on Iran.

topStories.title: Congressman writes to King Charles urging him to meet Epstein victims during US visit
topStories.description: While the trip is not officially confirmed, the King and Queen Camilla are reportedly planning to visit the US at the end of April.

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 32 of US-Israel attacks?
topStories.description: In an exclusive interview with Al Jazeera, Secretary of State Rubio said US war objectives would be achieved in 'weeks'.

topStories.title: US says Cuba policy unchanged despite allowing Russian tanker
topStories.description: The White House says US policy toward Cuba remains unchanged despite allowing a sanctioned Russian tanker.

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Abraham Lincoln: ‘The best way to predict your future is…’
topStories.description: Abraham Lincoln, a pivotal figure in American history, rose from humble beginnings to become 16th President. His leadership during the Civil War and commitment to abolishing slavery left a lasting legacy of resilience and justice, emphasising the importance of active effort in shaping the future.

topStories.title: Florida airport to be renamed after Trump — From money to iconic venues, US President's naming spree continues
topStories.description: With the name change, the Florida airport becomes the latest in a series of buildings, institutions, and money, among other things, to bear Donald Trump's name. Here's a look at some notable entities bearing the US President's name or likeness.

topStories.title: Wall Street rally ahead? Dow futures jump nearly 500 points on Trump’s reported plans to exit Iran war
topStories.description: US stock futures surged after reports suggested Donald Trump may seek to end the Iran conflict, easing investor concerns over prolonged geopolitical tensions. Gains in Dow, Nasdaq and S&P futures come amid stable oil prices and falling bond yields, although uncertainty remains due to ongoing risks in the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Iran-US war: US reveals why they killed Iranian leaders, Leavitt says ‘lied to United States’
topStories.description: The U.S. adopts a tougher stance on Iran, viewing past negotiations as deceptive.

topStories.description: Led by James's 125th regular-season triple-double, the LA Lakers destroyed the Washington Wizards for their 49th win.

topStories.description: The Supreme Court's upcoming ruling in West Virginia v. BPJ could determine whether states may legally separate school sports teams by biological sex.

dailyNews.description: The U.S.-Iran war has been underway for a month, but analysis suggests the U.S. has many unused options beyond a ground invasion, from striking Kharg Island to cyber operations.

dailyNews.title: MORNING GLORY: President Trump is on the cusp of a historic achievement
dailyNews.description: Iran accelerated its nuclear weapons program and missile buildup after Operation Midnight Hammer, Hugh Hewitt argues, calling President Donald Trump's response historic.

dailyNews.title: 'Pioneer Woman' reveals simple omelet trick to cut breakfast prep time as expert raises concerns
dailyNews.description: "Pioneer Woman" Ree Drummond cooked an omelet in a plastic bag in simmering water and loved it, but a food scientist says getting it just right is tricky.

dailyNews.title: Why Trump faces an agonizing decision on obliterating Iran’s oil supply if he can’t get a deal
dailyNews.description: Trump threatens to obliterate Iran's oil and power infrastructure on Truth Social while envoys reportedly pursue a nuclear deal through back-channel talks.

dailyNews.title: Florida county's Democratic Party chair accused of hitting man in head with bullhorn at 'No Kings' protest
dailyNews.description: The Hernando County Democratic Party chair was arrested for allegedly striking a disabled veteran with a bullhorn at a "No Kings" protest over the weekend.

dailyNews.title: Last day of Amazon's Big Spring Sale: Get up to 88% off Apple, DeWalt and more while you can
dailyNews.description: Save on a tire inflator that's down to one of its lowest prices ever, a sports bra that's nearly 80% off and more through tomorrow, March 31.

dailyNews.title: Shedeur Sanders ditches rookie number as Browns announce change heading into 2026 season
dailyNews.description: Shedeur Sanders is switching to No. 2 with the Cleveland Browns, reclaiming his college number from Jackson State and Colorado for his sophomore NFL season.

dailyNews.title: Teacher of the Year finalist gets 14 years for sexual relationship with student she kept contacting
dailyNews.description: Former Colorado Teacher of the Year finalist Tera Johnson-Swartz was sentenced to 14 years in prison for child sexual exploitation and cybercrime.

dailyNews.title: Fugitive illegal alien convict on the run after attempting to strike ICE officer with vehicle: DHS
dailyNews.description: Illegal alien Xa Lee tried to strike an ICE officer with his car in Sacramento, California, during an arrest attempt, and the fugitive remains at large.

dailyNews.title: Detransitioner Chloe Cole accuses media of ‘trying to suppress’ coverage of transgender shooters
dailyNews.description: Detransitioner Chloe Cole said on Adam Carolla’s podcast that media and medical institutions are failing to address mental health issues tied to transgender violence.

dailyNews.title: Bills to honor Charlie Kirk, free speech in several states hit roadblocks
dailyNews.description: Republican lawmakers in Oklahoma, Minnesota, and Tennessee have introduced bills to honor Charlie Kirk with statues and plazas after his assassination.

dailyNews.title: Kylie Jenner wows in tiny string bikini as she calls her beach vacation 'heaven'
dailyNews.description: Kylie Jenner shared tropical bikini photos on Instagram, captioning them 'heaven' while showing off neon and black swimwear during a solo getaway.

topStories.title: Karoline Leavitt blasts minimal media coverage of Sheridan Gorman murder

topStories.title: NBA's Tristan Thompson supports immigration done 'the right way' in nuanced comments on Trump crackdown
topStories.description: Longtime NBA player Tristan Thompson said he supported immigrating "the right way" but argued enforcement should be handled on a case-by-case basis.

topStories.title: TSA Workers Begin to Receive Paychecks After Trump Signs Executive Order
topStories.description: A memo that President Trump signed on Friday ordering the Department of Homeland Security to pay T.S.A. officers did not specify whether they would be paid on a regular schedule.

topStories.title: Senators Seek Answers From Trump Administration About Airport Immigration Arrests
topStories.description: Airport security officials have been sharing passenger data with immigration agents, but the program received little attention until videos captured a woman and her daughter being detained at San Francisco’s airport.

topStories.title: Mexico Pressures U.S. Over Deaths of Its Citizens in ICE Custody
topStories.description: Claudia Sheinbaum, president of Mexico, said her country would take legal steps to demand better conditions at immigration detention facilities, where she said 14 Mexican citizens had died since President Trump took office.

topStories.title: After Months of Threats, Trump Softens His Stance on Blocking Oil to Cuba
topStories.description: The White House press secretary said the United States would evaluate oil shipments to Cuba on a “case-by-case basis,” after a Russian tanker full of crude reached the island.

dailyNews.title: Trump Reveals New Look for White House Ballroom After Times Article
dailyNews.description: Architects and preservation organizations have warned that little scrutiny has been given to the project’s design plans.

dailyNews.title: ‘I Think That MAGA Is Dying:’ Inside the Youth Movement at CPAC
dailyNews.description: At a sparsely attended Conservative Political Action Conference, young Republicans were eager to start the post-Trump era.

dailyNews.title: States Plow Ahead With A.I. Regulation, Defying Trump
dailyNews.description: States ranging from California to Utah are taking steps to place guardrails on the technology even after the president ordered them to stop.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to invade Iran, "obliterate" its energy resources
dailyNews.description: Energy markets remain volatile as President Trump threatens Iran with an invasion to seize its oil while also suggesting a deal could soon end the war.

dailyNews.title: 3/23: Face the Nation
dailyNews.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," National Security Adviser Mike Waltz and Senate Homeland Security chair Rand Paul join as the backlash grows against the Trump administration for the deportation of alleged Venezuelan gang members. Plus. House intelligence committee member Democratic Rep. Jim Himes joins.

dailyNews.title: DeSantis signs bill to rename Palm Beach airport after Trump
dailyNews.description: President Trump's family business filed a trademark application for the name in February in response to the Florida bill.

dailyNews.title: Special Operations Forces, Marines and Army troops now in Middle East, sources say
dailyNews.description: The forces give Trump military options in Iran, including operations that could target opening the Strait of Hormuz, take oil from Kharg Island or seize Iran's stockpile of enriched uranium, sources said.

dailyNews.title: TSA workers start receiving paychecks after weeks of financial strain
dailyNews.description: TSA workers across the country are starting to receive about a month's worth of back pay after President Trump signed an executive order last week. Kris Van Cleave reports.

dailyNews.title: Are there talks to end the Iran war? Depends on which side you ask
dailyNews.description: It has been more than a week since President Donald Trump announced the U.S. was in conversation with Iran. But Tehran denies negotiations are taking place .

dailyNews.title: Medicaid cuts threaten hundreds of hospitals, new report finds
dailyNews.description: More than 400 hospitals across the United States are at high risk of closing or cutting services because of the Medicaid cuts in President Donald Trump’s “big, beautiful bill,” according to an analysis from the progressive watchdog group Public Citizen

dailyNews.title: WH pressed on Trump’s threat to hit civilian infrastructure in Iran
dailyNews.description: In a post on Truth Social, President Donald Trump threatened the destruction of Iran's civilian energy and water infrastructure if a deal to end the war and reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz is not reached soon. NBC News' Garrett Haake questioned White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt about the president's threat.
